title: crataegus berberifolia var. engelmannii
intro: Crataegus berberifolia var. engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crataegus berberifolia var. engelmannii include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and reducing the risk of heart disease. In herbal preparations, the leaves, flowers, and berries of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall cardiovascular well-being.
